_note: NON-SECRET voice routing config. Voice IDs are identifiers, not secrets. The ElevenLabs API key comes ONLY from the environment variable ELEVENLABS_API_KEY and is NEVER stored or committed here.

stt.note: he/ru/en; capture via safe persistent WASAPI (HyperX, WDM-KS excluded)

he.reason: ElevenLabs Hebrew is unacceptable (gibberish, including the cloned Hebrew voice). Route Hebrew to a dedicated Hebrew TTS provider later.
he.interim_fallback: pyttsx3 only if a Hebrew SAPI voice is installed; otherwise Hebrew TTS is unavailable until a provider is chosen

secrets.policy: key read from env only; never stored, printed, or committed
